name: Molmo 2 8B
archDisplay: Dense transformer (Qwen3-8B LLM decoder + SigLIP2 vision encoder)
note: Latest open multimodal flagship (Qwen3-based); extends Molmo's grounded pointing to video with frame-level spatial/temporal grounding and multi-object tracking. Note: weights are Apache 2.0 but some training datasets are restricted to academic/non-commercial research use per Ai2's own blog.
tpsNote: No GGUF/llama.cpp support found (custom molmo2 architecture); MLX quants available for Apple Silicon.

results.notes: Molmo2 Technical Report Table 6 (11-benchmark image suite), Molmo2-8B row. Column order verified via direct PDF text extraction (pdftotext -raw) and cross-checked against the paper's own claims (e.g. Molmo2-8B stated as SOTA among open models on VQAv2/RealWorldQA, which the reconstructed columns confirm).
Molmo2 Technical Report Table 6, Molmo2-8B row.
Molmo2 Technical Report Table 6, Molmo2-8B row; consistent with the paper's text noting Molmo2 is 'a bit behind the best open-weight model' on DocVQA (Qwen3-VL-8B=96.1, PLM-8B=94.6 both higher).

Molmo2 Technical Report Table 6, Molmo2-8B row. Note this exceeds the taxonomy's documented textvqa range (40-75); several other 2026-era models in the same table (GPT-5=78.7, Qwen3-VL-8B=82.8, PLM-8B=86.5) also exceed 75, suggesting the taxonomy range predates this generation of models rather than indicating a mapping error.

VQA v2.0; Molmo2 Technical Report Table 6. This is the single highest score in the entire column across every open-weight/open model listed, matching the paper's explicit claim of 'state-of-the-art performance on VQA v2.0' among open models - strong confirmation of correct column mapping.

Molmo2 Technical Report Table 6, Molmo2-8B row; consistent with the paper's statement that Molmo2 'is behind on open-weight reasoning benchmarks (MathVista, MMMU)' - Molmo2-8B's 53.0 is indeed well below most open-weight peers (InternVL3.5-8B 73.4, Qwen3-VL-8B 69.6).
MathVista testmini; Molmo2 Technical Report Table 6, Molmo2-8B row.

Video-MME (no-subtitle variant); Molmo2 Technical Report Table 2 (video benchmarks), Molmo2-8B row. Table's overall 'Average' column (63.1) matches the HF model card's single reported metric ('Average Score on 15 Academic Benchmarks') exactly, confirming this table and its column order are correctly identified.
Molmo2 Technical Report Table 19 (Appendix D.2, 'NLP Benchmarks'), Molmo2-8B row - a small, cleanly-labeled table (MMLU/GSM8K/ARC-C/MBPP+) with no column-order ambiguity.
Molmo2 Technical Report Table 19, Molmo2-8B row.
ARC-Challenge; Molmo2 Technical Report Table 19, Molmo2-8B row.
MBPP+; Molmo2 Technical Report Table 19, Molmo2-8B row.

verificationNotes: Existence and Dec 11, 2025 release date confirmed via allenai.org/blog/molmo2. paramsB re-derived exactly from model.safetensors.index.json: 8,661,703,120 = 8.66B (exact match). config.json confirms text max_position_embeddings=36864 (=36K, exact match to ctxK) and architecture (Qwen3-8B decoder + SigLIP2-based ViT, 36 transformer blocks). License is Apache 2.0 per HF repo, though Ai2's blog notes some training data is restricted to academic/non-commercial use (added as a caveat in the note field). The single result row (63.1 avg, with GPT-5 70.6 / Gemini 2.5 Pro 71.2 / Qwen3-VL-8B 59.5 comparisons) was confirmed literally present on the cited HF model card.
